zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Eyre I於1396年出生在英國德比夏爾哈黑薩時，他的父親Nicholas Eyre26歲，母親Johanna Elizabeth Barlow22歲。他於1420年與Joanna Padley在英國德比夏爾哈黑薩結婚。他們至少是12個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1459年3月21日在他的家鄉享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾哈黑薩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Eyre I于1396年出生在英国德比夏爾哈黑薩时，他的父亲Nicholas Eyre26岁，母亲Johanna Elizabeth Barlow22岁。他于1420年与Joanna Padley在英国德比夏爾哈黑薩结婚。他们至少是12个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1459年3月21日在他的家乡享年63岁，埋葬在英国英格兰德比夏爾哈黑薩。

nameMeanings.name: Eyre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: This name was that of a historically prominent family in Galway (Ireland) since the 1650s.

variants.name: Ayer
meanings: English and Scottish: from Middle English eir, eyr ‘heir’ (Anglo-Norman French heyr, Old French (h)eir, Latin heres). Forms such as Richard le Heyer were frequent in Middle English, denoting a man who was well known to be the heir to the main property in a particular locality, either one who had already inherited or one with great expectations.
English: from the Anglo-Norman French and Middle English personal name Aier (ancient Germanic Agihari).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Eyre I was born in 1396, in Hathersage, Derbyshire, England, his father, Nicholas Eyre, was 26 and his mother, Johanna Elizabeth Barlow, was 22. He married Joanna Padley in 1420, in Hathersage, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 12 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 21 March 1459, in his hometown, at the age of 63, and was buried in Hathersage, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Eyre I est né en 1396, à Hathersage, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Eyre, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Johanna Elizabeth Barlow, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Joanna Padley en 1420, à Hathersage, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 12 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 21 mars 1459, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Hathersage, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Eyre I 1396 in Hathersage, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Eyre 26 und seine Mutter Johanna Elizabeth Barlow 22. Er hat 1420 in Hathersage, Derbyshire, England Joanna Padley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 12 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 21. März 1459 im Alter von 63 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Hathersage, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Eyre I è nato il nel 1396 nel Hathersage, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Nicholas Eyre, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Johanna Elizabeth Barlow, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Joanna Padley nel 1420, nel Hathersage, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 12 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 21 marzo 1459, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Hathersage, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Eyre Iが1396年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアハスエルサッジで生まれた時，父Nicholas Eyreは26歳，母Johanna Elizabeth Barlowは22歳であった。1420年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアハスエルサッジでJoanna Padleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも12人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1459年3月21日に故郷で63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアハスエルサッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Eyre I(이)가 1396년 영국 더비실르 하더사지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Eyre(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Elizabeth Barlow(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1420년 영국 더비실르 하더사지에서 Joanna Padley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1459년 3월 21일 그의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 하더사지에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Joanna Padley em 1420, em Hathersage, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 12 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Eyre I родился в 1396 г. в местности хатирсадж, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas Eyre было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Elizabeth Barlow, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanna Padley в 1420 г. в местности хатирсадж, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 12 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 21 марта 1459 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности хатирсадж, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Eyre I nació en 1396, en Hathersage, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Eyre, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Johanna Elizabeth Barlow, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Joanna Padley en 1420, en Hathersage, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 12 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 21 de marzo de 1459, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Hathersage, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
